title: Atlantis Weapony
description: Adds armor and weapons from Aquaman
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f68bd5fd8f53ccf7149fe6af48a73c06462b7d.png)


### This mod add weapons, armor, ores, blocks and items from the Aquaman movie universe, you can have the powers of Atlantis when explore the oceans.


![Atlan Throne](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/323cc8e267efa3ee6e6bc75c9c39079edbd8e027_0.webp)


### This is King Atlan's throne where King Atlan's corpse is located, you will have a small chance of finding it in the deep ocean biome.


![Atlan Corpse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2038c610877df0820c594becce6da98560b77ab8_0.webp)

### If you click on King Atlan's corpse with the left button, you will possess his powerful armor and his trident, you can craft royal version with the armor.

![Atlan Armor Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b532689865103cd2ed19caeaf89c1855cac3b8f_0.webp)

### With gold, atlantean steel and heart of the sea you can craft the Atlantean Amulet, it even gives powers such as breathing underwater, resistance, jump boost, night vision, strength, resistance to fall damage and fast swimming.

![Atlantean Amulet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ec9e9f9b1b9670db8c06bebe63675d1c8d06e94.png)
